While doing the domain name resolution  such as www.xxx.com, all the client using this dhcp server will try the following order.1. System tries to look up www.xxx.com if the dns find a IP addr, the client will go on use this ip.2. Otherwise, the system will automatically add th

Then his space will be test.A.com. This works fine.2.Company's internal network using a dhcp server which automatically adds

**Remediation**: fix lib
